upload.dran_n_drop: Drag & drop or click to choose files
upload.privacy: By clicking on upload button or uploading document you are agreeing with our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service

result.success_h2: Your file has been processed and is ready to download.
result.promoText: Power your work with Conholdate Drive — the all-in-one cloud for storing, editing, and signing documents. Secure, ad-free, and easy to use. Join today and get started for free.
result.fileSaved: File has been saved to your storage
result.authorize: Please authorize to your Drive first using this link

structuredData.howToDesc: {%a} {%f} for free with fast and secure online document {%p}

promo.title: Try Conholdate Drive
promo.description: Start your journey with Conholdate Drive for free and explore a clean, ad-free workspace built with an intuitive UI/UX that makes managing files effortless. Whether you need the essentials with our Free plan, more flexibility with Basic, or the full power of advanced features in Pro, Conholdate Drive grows with your needs—giving you a seamless, distraction-free experience from day one.

experimental.title: Experimental PDF Translation
experimental.description: For higher-quality PDF translations, this option uses an advanced processing method that better preserves the original document's layout, formatting, and visual appearance. While it may take a bit longer to complete, it usually delivers more accurate and polished results, especially for complex PDFs.

file_empty.title: Oops! That file is empty.
file_empty.sub_title: The selected file contains no data (0 bytes).
file_empty.text: Please select a file that contains content and try again.

file_too_big.title: Oops! That file is too large.
file_too_big.sub_title: Your file exceeds the ${file-size-limit} MB upload limit.
file_too_big.text: Upgrade your plan to upload and process larger files, enjoy faster performance, advanced AI tools, additional storage and enhanced sharing features.

daily_operations_limit.title: Daily limit reached.
daily_operations_limit.sub_title: You've reached the daily processing limit for your current plan.
daily_operations_limit.text: Please try again tomorrow or upgrade your subscription to increase daily limits, unlock faster processing, priority access and extra storage.

connection_failure.title: Connection to the server was lost.
connection_failure.sub_title: Please check your internet connection and try again.
connection_failure.text: If the problem continues, please refresh the page and try again later.

timeout.title: Processing is taking longer than expected.
timeout.sub_title: Your file could not be processed within the expected time.
timeout.text: Please wait a few minutes and try again. Large or complex files may require additional processing time.

file_damaged.title: The file appears to be damaged or corrupted.
file_damaged.sub_title: We were unable to read or process the uploaded file.
file_damaged.text: Please verify that the file opens correctly on your device and try uploading it again.

unsupported_format.title: Unsupported file format.
unsupported_format.sub_title: This file type is currently not supported.
unsupported_format.text: Please convert the file to a supported format and try again.

empty_file.title: The uploaded file is empty.
empty_file.sub_title: The selected file does not contain any data.
empty_file.text: Please choose a valid file and try again.

upload_failed.title: File upload failed.
upload_failed.text: Please try again. If the issue continues, check your internet connection or refresh the page.

processing_failed.title: File processing failed.
processing_failed.sub_title: An unexpected error occurred while processing your file.
processing_failed.text: Please try again later or upload a different file.

default.title: Something went wrong while processing your request.
default.sub_title: Our team has been notified and is working to resolve the issue.

link.title: Share via link
link.text: Copy link from the input or click on copy to clipboard button

email.title: Share via email
email.text: Shared link will be sent to specified email

save_to_drive.title: Save to Drive
save_to_drive.progress: Uploading file to Conholdate Drive. Please wait...
save_to_drive.success: File saved successfully in your Drive account.
save_to_drive.sign_up: To save files in your Drive account you need to signin or signup first.
